DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN KAPLAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE THREE "SAM" DEFENDANTS SHALL EACH PROVIDE DULY EXECUTED, AND VERIFIED, AMENDED SUBSTANTIVE RESPONSES TO EACH RFA WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. IT IS FURTHER HEREBY ORDERED THAT TO THE EXTENT ANY SUCH AMENDED RESPONSE TO ANY OF THE RFA'S ARE OTHER THAN AN UNEQUIVOCAL ADMISSION, THEN A FURTHER RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 17.1, DULY EXECUTED AND VERIFIED, SHALL ALSO BE PROVIDED AT THE SAME TIME AS THE AMENDED RFA RESPONSES. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
